    "Temporary bracing removed before decking or permanent stability achieved",
    "Columns/beams lack lateral support, creating immediate collapse hazard"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately evacuate area and barricade",
    "Reinstall temporary bracing per erection plan before any further work",
    "Do not proceed with decking or loading until stability is restored and verified by competent person"

  "rationale": "Removing temporary bracing before the structure is stable violates OSHA 1926.754(b)(2) and AISC 303 Section 7.3. The frame is in a potentially unstable condition with high risk of progressive collapse. Work cannot continue until bracing is reinstated and the erection is made safe.",

    "AISC 303 Section 7.3"
  ]
